|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Hypothetical Steps: |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| 1. Log into FB ad account and set your data preset to Last (XXXX) Days |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| 2. To calculate cold campaign D.A.M, make sure to to select those campaigns and filter the rest. |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| 3. Set your reporting columns to breakdown ROAS for 1 Day View, 1 Day Click, 7 Day Click, and 28 Day Click |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| 4. Plug the 1/1/7/28 return data into the calculator. |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| 5. Plug in your "Success Metric" which is the ideal ROAS you want from your campaign type |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| 6. Analyze Your Results: |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| D.A.Ms -> This is your Projection Metric. "Your 1 Day results will be X times better on Day 7 or 28" |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Target ROAS -> These are the ROAS you want to shoot for when looking at a single day's results or 7 days results that will predict your Success Metrics |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
